title: address helpers always allocate on no-op path
description: strip_trailing_comment in message.rs ends with s.to_string() which allocates even when nothing was stripped. bare_address calls strip_trailing_comment unconditionally and returns String. Both are called on every address/envelope test evaluation. Returning Cow<str> -- borrowing when no stripping needed, owning when it is -- eliminates the allocation on the common path.
